name: Hamburger Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground beef, onion, and 2/3 of the mushrooms in a skillet until the beef is well browned. Drain off excess fat.
2. Add salt, pepper, Worcestershire sauce, and biscuit mix to the meat mixture. Spread evenly in a pastry-lined pan.
3. Beat eggs lightly, then add cottage cheese and mix thoroughly.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the meat filling. Garnish with remaining mushrooms.
5. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes. Serve hot.
